MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-25-2018 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT AND BURI BURI ELEMENTARY SCHOOL'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS FILED A STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AND THE PLAINTIFFS ARE REQUIRED TO PAY ALL TRANSFER COSTS. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =302/HK

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2018 Continued To Jan-02-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue Of Defendants
Off Calendar Oct-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SOUTH SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT, BURI BURI ELEMENTARY SCHOOL's Motion To Transfer Venue Of Defendants.

Defendants South San Francisco Unified School District and Buri Buri Elementary School's motion to change venue is granted. Plaintiffs filed a statement of non-opposition. The case is transferred to San Mateo County and the plaintiffs are required to pay all transfer costs.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, Maria.Torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
